speaker: speaker2
text: Tired and stressed . This wedding is giving me a headache .

speaker: speaker1
text: Just relax . With me as your maid of honor , everything will be fine !

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm worried that everything will be chaotic !

speaker: speaker1
text: Hey ! I'm the tour guide . I'll take care of the Taiwanese guests .

speaker: speaker2
text: You're going to have to tell them what to do in church , what everything means ...
